title: Astroflow
description: A client-side cinematic meteor stream that transforms the night sky into a flowing astral spectacle.
body:
![w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d8f21b6a49e3827a38b648b54a9a54023edb8a5.jpeg)
🌌 Astroflow — Cinematic Meteor Showers

Transform your night sky into a breathtaking astral spectacle.

Astroflow is a lightweight client-side mod that introduces smooth, cinematic meteor streams flowing across the sky — designed for immersion, atmosphere, and pure visual beauty.

Unlike chaotic meteor effects, Astroflow creates a coherent celestial flow, where meteors travel in unified directions, forming elegant streaks that feel natural and mesmerizing.

✨ **Features**

☄️ Cinematic meteor streams — not random, but flowing as a unified system

🌠 Long glowing trails with smooth fading

🌌 Depth and perspective — distant and close meteors feel different

🎬 Perfect for screenshots and videos

⚡ Lightweight & performance-friendly

🧩 Client-side only — works on any server

🎨 Visual Design


**Astroflow focuses on visual harmony and motion:**
Meteors move in parallel, forming a natural sky flow
Subtle variation keeps the effect dynamic without breaking immersion
Carefully tuned brightness and speed create a cinematic feel

🖥️ Compatibility

✔ Latest Fabric

✔ Client-side only

✔ No impact on gameplay
